cat_breeds = ('Abyssinian',
              'Bengal',
              'Birman',
              'Bombay',
              'British_Shorthair', 
              'Egyptian_Mau',
              'Maine_Coon',
              'Persian',
              'Ragdoll',

              'leonberger',
              'miniature_pinscher',
              'beagle',
              'samoyed',
              'shiba_inu',

In [3]:
from glob import glob
import pandas as pd

df           = pd.DataFrame({'path':glob('/content/images/*.jpg')})
df['breed']  = df['path'].str.rsplit('/', 1).str.get(1).str.rsplit('_', 1).str.get(0)
df['family'] = df['breed'].replace(cat_breeds, 'cat').replace(dog_breeds, 'dog')
print(df.value_counts('family'))

family
dog    4990
cat    2400
dtype: int64
In [4]:
from keras.preprocessing.image import ImageDataGenerator

datagen  = ImageDataGenerator(rescale=1/255,validation_split=1/3)
params   = dict(dataframe=df,x_col='path',y_col='family',batch_size=32,seed=42,shuffle=True,target_size=(160,160), class_mode='binary')

ds_train = datagen.flow_from_dataframe(subset='training',**params)
ds_valid = datagen.flow_from_dataframe(subset='validation',**params)

Found 4927 validated image filenames belonging to 2 classes.
Found 2463 validated image filenames belonging to 2 classes.
In [5]:
from matplotlib import pyplot as plt
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(15,13))

sample = df.sample(6)
for (idx, (path, breed, family)), ax in zip(sample.iterrows(), axes.flat):
    img = plt.imread(path)
    ax.imshow(img)
    ax.set_title(breed + '\n' + r"$(\bf{" + family + "})$")
    ax.axis('off')

plt.show()
In [6]:
from tensorflow import keras
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def build_model(input_shape, num_classes):
    inputs = keras.Input(shape=input_shape)
    
    # Entry block
    x = keras.layers.Conv2D(16, 3, strides=2, padding="same")(inputs)
    x = keras.layers.BatchNormalization()(x)
    x = keras.layers.Activation("relu")(x)

    x = keras.layers.Conv2D(32, 3, padding="same")(x)
    x = keras.layers.BatchNormalization()(x)
    x = keras.layers.Activation("relu")(x)

    previous_block_activation = x  # Set aside residual

    for size in [64, 128, 256]:
        x = keras.layers.Activation("relu")(x)
        x = keras.layers.SeparableConv2D(size, 3, padding="same")(x)
        x = keras.layers.BatchNormalization()(x)

        x = keras.layers.Activation("relu")(x)
        x = keras.layers.SeparableConv2D(size, 3, padding="same")(x)
        x = keras.layers.BatchNormalization()(x)

        x = keras.layers.MaxPooling2D(3, strides=2, padding="same")(x)

        # Project residual
        residual = keras.layers.Conv2D(size, 1, strides=2, padding="same")(
            previous_block_activation
        )
        x = keras.layers.add([x, residual])  # Add back residual
        previous_block_activation = x  # Set aside next residual

    x = keras.layers.SeparableConv2D(512, 3, padding="same")(x)
    x = keras.layers.BatchNormalization()(x)
    x = keras.layers.Activation("relu")(x)

    x = keras.layers.GlobalAveragePooling2D()(x)
    if num_classes == 2:
        activation = "sigmoid"
        units = 1
    else:
        activation = "softmax"
        units = num_classes

    x = keras.layers.Dropout(0.5)(x)
    outputs = keras.layers.Dense(units, activation=activation)(x)
    model   = keras.Model(inputs, outputs)
    model.compile(optimizer=keras.optimizers.Adam(1e-3), loss="binary_crossentropy", metrics=["accuracy"])
    return model
In [10]:
from sklearn.utils.class_weight import compute_class_weight as ccw
class_weights = ccw(class_weight='balanced',classes=np.unique(ds_train.classes),y=ds_train.classes)
class_weights = dict(zip(np.unique(ds_train.classes), class_weights))

model = build_model(input_shape=ds_train.target_size+(3,), num_classes=np.unique(ds_train.classes).size)
fit   = model.fit(ds_train,epochs=16,validation_data=ds_valid,class_weight=class_weights)

In [11]:
history = pd.DataFrame(fit.history)
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15,5), sharex=True)
history.plot.line(y=['loss', 'val_loss'], ax=axes[0])
history.plot.line(y=['accuracy', 'val_accuracy'], ax=axes[1], xlabel='epochs')
plt.show()
In [12]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(15,10), sharex=True)
imgs, ytrue = ds_valid.next()
ypred       = (model.predict(imgs) > .5).astype(int)
categories  = ('cat', 'dog')

for img, y, y_, ax in zip(imgs, ytrue, ypred, axes.flat):
    ax.imshow(img)
    title = f'True: {categories[int(y)]} / Pred: {categories[y_[0]]}'

    if categories[int(y)] == categories[y_[0]]:color='green'
    else: color='red'
    
    ax.set_title(title, color=color, fontweight='bold')
    
    ax.axis('off')

plt.show()
In [13]:
from sklearn.metrics import classification_report

y_true = ds_valid.classes
y_pred = (model.predict(ds_valid) > .5).astype(int).ravel()

print(classification_report(y_true, y_pred, target_names=ds_valid.class_indices.keys()))

         dog       0.67      0.56      0.61      1660
